requestedAction: Create one branch, update approved Social Media Management System files with the AG Digitalz internal draft client config, and open one pull request in gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system.
scope: This approval allows AG OS to use GitHub for exactly one live builder milestone in the existing private repository gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system. The allowed live actions are limited to creating branch ag-os/ag-digitalz-draft-config from main SHA 7204846654ef448f6c0c78027a569b7707c618b8, updating README.md, package.json, index.html, src/main.js, src/styles.css, src/data/templates.js, src/lib/safety.js, and src/lib/status.js with the owner-approved AG Digitalz internal draft client config, and opening exactly one pull request to main. This approval does not allow repository creation, merging, deployments, Netlify, n8n activation, domain or DNS changes, paid actions, credentials, social account connections, posting, scheduling, DMs, comments, analytics API usage, production data, customer private data, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist changes, Constitution changes, additional repositories, additional branches, or additional pull requests.
revocationPath: Expired approval lock blocked or would block the mandatory boot sequence. Original expiration: 2026-07-06T01:52:50Z. This approval is no longer valid for gated actions. Historical proof remains preserved; any future action requires a new scoped owner approval lock.

evidence.reference: Owner-approved orchestrated task: add AG Digitalz as the first internal Social Media Management System client in draft mode, then update the staged Social Media app to show and use that internal client config.
npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, node --test tests/*.test.mjs, and target repo npm.cmd run check/build/test passed before execution.

approvalText: Owner-approved orchestrated task: update gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system with AG Digitalz as the first internal client config. Allowed live GitHub action for Phase 2: create branch ag-os/ag-digitalz-draft-config, update approved starter app files, and open one PR to main. Do not merge until review passes.
